title: tender malty russian kelp borscht
description: a hearty russian beet soup featuring dasima-kombu for added depth of flavor, perfect for a chilly evening

ingredients.name: dasima-kombu
ingredients.notes: reconstituted in 2 cups of water for at least 4 hours

ingredients.name: apple cider vinegar
ingredients.notes: used in place of sugar for added depth of flavor

instructions: combine dasima-kombu and 2 cups of water in a large pot and bring to a boil
reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes
add beets, carrots, onions, and garlic to the pot and cook for an additional 20 minutes
add apple cider vinegar and vegetable broth to the pot and stir to combine
season with salt and pepper to taste
serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh dill
